# PERF-054 negative: pooled strings.Builder reset between uses
lang: go
file: PERF-054-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"strings"
	"sync"
)

var builderPool = sync.Pool{
	New: func() any { return &strings.Builder{} },
}

func EncodePath(segments []string) string {
	b := builderPool.Get().(*strings.Builder)
	b.Reset()
	for _, seg := range segments {
		b.WriteString(seg)
		b.WriteString("/")
	}
	out := b.String()
	builderPool.Put(b)
	return out
}
